items.translated_title: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirms breach, tells every customer to rotate sensitive keys
items.content: Braintrust, a startup that makes an “operating system for engineers building AI software,” notified customers that hackers broke into one of its Amazon cloud environments, and is asking customers to rotate their API keys.
